A fun, lively and kind soul — your clothes, designed by hand.

The Atelier

One designer. Endless devotion to detail.

Luni Fashion is an independent boutique built on a simple belief: clothing should be made for you — your shape, your story, your occasion. From wedding outfits to everyday Indo-Western designs, every stitch is placed with patience and care.

Clients return year after year for the neat finishes, the honest prices, and the warmth that turns a fitting into a friendship.
